headline: Former Graphic Packaging CEO to lead International Paper spinout
summary: Mike Doss said he will listen, learn and collaborate as Global Cellulose Fibers finalizes “long-term plans for this new standalone business.” His appointment comes as a class action lawsuit questions some of his actions at GPI.
